coordinate_reference_systems.solver: local meters: x downstream, y river-left positive
coordinate_reference_systems.unreal: georeferenced corridor transform derived from the working CRS
coordinate_reference_systems.working: local projected CRS selected per section at extraction time

provenance.redistribution_notes: Do not redistribute third-party imagery, guidebook text, or field media unless the manifest records explicit rights.

remote_fetches.notes: Representative bounding-box query for DEM discovery; production pull should pick highest-resolution 3DEP/state lidar product with metadata.
Use 3DHP if available for the bbox; otherwise use NHD/NHDPlus flowlines and catchments.
Overpass query should fetch river way, roads, trails, bridges, parking/access points, and named nearby features within the bbox.
Use most recent leaf-on/low-shadow NAIP where available, then compare with historic imagery at known gauge values.
Daily discharge query for preliminary flow percentiles. Add instantaneous values and stage parameter 00065 when building final presets.
Link NOAA/NWPS/NWM reach context after the gauge/COMID mapping is verified.
Use for drainage area and transfer-function context; keep lower confidence than direct gauge observations.

sources.access_notes: Use The National Map, 3DEP services, or state lidar portals for DEM/lidar tiles.
sources.attribution: Credit USGS 3D Elevation Program and preserve dataset/product identifiers in source manifests.
sources.license_or_terms: U.S. federal source; treat as public-domain geospatial data unless a product-specific notice says otherwise.
sources.title: 3D Elevation Program (3DEP)

sources.access_notes: Use 3DHP where available; fall back to NHD/NHDPlus flowlines and catchments for older coverage.
sources.attribution: Credit USGS 3D Hydrography Program, NHD, or NHDPlus as applicable.
sources.license_or_terms: U.S. federal source; preserve attribution and confirm product-specific terms.
sources.title: 3D Hydrography Program, NHD, and NHDPlus

sources.access_notes: Inventory and download elevation, hydrography, and base map products by bounding box.
sources.attribution: Credit source product providers listed by The National Map download metadata.
sources.license_or_terms: U.S. federal access portal; individual products keep their own metadata and attribution.
sources.title: The National Map

sources.access_notes: Use parameter 00060 for discharge and 00065 for stage when available.
sources.attribution: Credit USGS Water Data for the Nation / NWIS and record gauge site, parameter code, and retrieval date.
sources.license_or_terms: U.S. federal hydrologic data; cite USGS Water Data for the Nation and site IDs.
sources.title: Water Services and NWIS

sources.access_notes: Use as forecast/model context, not as sole validation truth for historical runnable bands.
sources.attribution: Credit NOAA National Water Prediction Service / National Water Model for modeled flow context.
sources.license_or_terms: Public forecast/model products; cite NOAA/NWS/NWPS and verify service-specific use notes.
sources.title: National Water Prediction Service and National Water Model context

sources.access_notes: Use for ungauged or transfer-function context; flag lower confidence than direct gauge history.
sources.attribution: Credit USGS StreamStats for basin characteristics and estimated streamflow statistics.
sources.license_or_terms: U.S. federal analysis service; cite USGS StreamStats and preserve report metadata.
sources.title: StreamStats

sources.access_notes: Use for water masks, exposed rocks, banks, access points, vegetation, foam texture, and visual reference.
sources.attribution: Credit USDA/FSA NAIP imagery, acquisition year, and tile identifiers.
sources.license_or_terms: Public U.S. aerial imagery source; verify product year/portal terms and attribution before redistribution.
sources.title: NAIP aerial imagery

sources.access_notes: Use mostly for access roads, trails, bridges, named features, land use, and supplemental hydrography.
sources.attribution: Credit OpenStreetMap contributors where OSM data is used.
sources.license_or_terms: ODbL; requires attribution and care with database derivatives and share-alike obligations.
sources.title: OpenStreetMap supplemental map data

sources.access_notes: Use for named rapids, hazards, portages, access, commercial season, and difficulty calibration.
sources.attribution: Credit reference title/author/URL where licenses allow; keep internal notes separate from redistributable assets.
sources.license_or_terms: Do not copy protected guidebook text or photos into the repo; record citations, page/URL pointers, and derived review notes only.
sources.provider: Guidebooks, outfitters, public agency pages, and reviewed local references
sources.title: Human rapid and season references

sources.access_notes: Use for validation and photoreal/audio references after permissions are complete.
sources.attribution: Credit capture crew and rights owner according to media release.
sources.license_or_terms: Require explicit project-owned or licensed rights, model/property releases where applicable, and redistribution notes.
sources.title: Field photos, drone video, audio, GPS, and notes
